# CostAttribution

> Links an LLM call to cost tags for attribution tracking

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| llmCallId | string | yes | - | Reference to the LLM call |
| tagKey | string | yes | - | Dimension (feature, team, customer) |
| tagValue | string | yes | - | Value (support-bot, engineering, acme-corp) |
| costUsd | number | yes | - | Cost attributed to this tag |
| inputTokens | integer | yes | - | Input tokens for this call |
| outputTokens | integer | yes | - | Output tokens for this call |
| model | string | yes | - | Model used |
| provider | string | yes | - | Provider (openai, anthropic) |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Queries

- `costByTag`: `SELECT tag_key, tag_value, SUM(cost_usd) as total_cost, COUNT(*) as call_count, SUM(input_tokens) as total_input, SUM(output_tokens) as total_output FROM {{table}} WHERE created_at BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY tag_key, tag_value ORDER BY total_cost DESC`
- `costByTagAndModel`: `SELECT tag_key, tag_value, model, SUM(cost_usd) as total_cost, COUNT(*) as call_count FROM {{table}} WHERE created_at BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY tag_key, tag_value, model ORDER BY total_cost DESC`
- `costTrend`: `SELECT DATE(created_at) as day, tag_key, tag_value, SUM(cost_usd) as daily_cost FROM {{table}} WHERE tag_key = ? AND created_at BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY day, tag_key, tag_value ORDER BY day`
- `topSpenders`: `SELECT tag_value, SUM(cost_usd) as total_cost, COUNT(*) as call_count, AVG(cost_usd) as avg_cost FROM {{table}} WHERE tag_key = ? AND created_at BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY tag_value ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT ?`

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/cost-attribution` — List all
- `POST /api/cost-attribution` — Create
- `GET /api/cost-attribution/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/cost-attribution/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/cost-attribution/:id` — Delete
